descFull: Hook-based token compressor for 5 AI CLI hosts (Claude Code, Copilot CLI, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI). Up to 95% bash compression, signature-mode for code reads, cross-call dedup, MCP server, self-teaching protocol. Zero runtime deps.
